overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a rain-slicked neon-lit downtown district at night. The player traverses a futuristic urban plaza, crosses a street with light traffic, and ascends to an elevated pedestrian walkway surrounded by massive holographic advertisements and glass skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with holographic advertisements

events.description: vehicles become visible approaching the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the wet plaza toward the street intersection, observing the neon-lit glass towers

entered.detail: tall modern glass building with illuminated cyan and white window lights
massive multi-screen advertising tower displaying neon holographic advertisements
glowing white cylindrical markers lining the plaza pathway

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a wide, rain-slicked urban plaza surrounded by towering glass office buildings and massive curved digital billboards emitting cyan and magenta neon light. The wet pavement reflects the surrounding illumination as the player approaches a street intersection with sparse pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: steps onto the yellow-striped crosswalk entering the street intersection
black SUV and sedan pass through the intersection in front of the player

agents.ego_description: crossing the street while navigating around other pedestrians and observing the passing traffic

notable_agents.action: woman holding a purple umbrella walking across the crosswalk in the same direction

entered.detail: tall black pole with illuminated green traffic signal and crosswalk sign
bold yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The player enters a busy intersection crosswalk marked with bold yellow stripes, sharing the space with other pedestrians including a woman with a purple umbrella. Vehicles pass through the intersection as the player crosses the wet asphalt, with the massive digital billboards remaining prominent on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance stairs leading to elevated pedestrian plaza

events.description: reaches the opposite sidewalk and approaches the wide concrete stairs
begins ascending the concrete staircase to the upper plaza level

agents.ego_description: walking up the stairs following a pedestrian with an umbrella while passing close to large digital billboards

notable_agents.action: woman with purple umbrella ascending the stairs ahead of the player

entered.detail: wide grey concrete staircase with yellow edge markings leading upward to the plaza
massive curved digital billboard displaying 'FEEL THE CHEMISTRY' advertisement in pink neon

segments.scene_description: After crossing the street, the player approaches and ascends a wide concrete staircase leading to an elevated pedestrian area. A large digital wall on the left displays vibrant pink advertisements, while the woman with the purple umbrella continues up the stairs ahead. The environment becomes more sheltered under building overhangs.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with benches and towering holographic displays

events.description: passes by several individuals seated on yellow benches along the plaza wall
camera tilts upward to view the towering billboards and night sky between buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway, observing the massive advertisements and urban architecture while passing seated pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man sitting on a yellow bench looking at his phone

entered.detail: row of illuminated yellow seating benches along the plaza wall with people sitting
large mature tree with green foliage in a raised concrete planter
massive curved advertising screen displaying product advertisements high above the plaza

segments.scene_description: The player explores an elevated pedestrian plaza lined with yellow benches and decorative trees, passing a man seated on a bench. The camera pans upward to reveal the night sky between towering buildings covered in massive digital billboards. The wet tiled surface continues to reflect the surrounding neon illumination as the player moves deeper into the plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked urban plaza up into a sheltered, neon-drenched elevated pedestrian district. It begins by moving across a wide plaza where cyan and magenta light from curved digital billboards reflects off the wet pavement toward a street intersection. As the camera enters a yellow-striped crosswalk, it weaves through sparse pedestrians and passing vehicles while the massive billboards remain a dominant presence on the right. The scene then shifts as the player ascends a wide concrete staircase alongside a woman with a purple umbrella, moving past vibrant pink digital walls and under the cover of building overhangs. Finally, the camera explores an elevated plaza lined with yellow benches and decorative trees, panning upward to reveal the night sky framed by towering skyscrapers and glowing advertisements.
